login.tagline: Plan your perfect day in the UK

errors.userNotFound: No account found with this email.
errors.emailInUse: An account with this email already exists.
errors.weakPassword: Password must be at least 6 characters.
errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.googleFailed: Google sign-in failed. Please try again.

location.notSupported: Geolocation is not supported by your browser.
location.denied: Location access denied. Please enable location permissions.
location.unavailable: Unable to retrieve your location. Please try again.

welcome.tagline: Plan your perfect day in the UK
welcome.subtitle: Swipe through activities and restaurants. We'll build your itinerary.

interests.title: What interests you?
interests.subtitle: Pick activities and food preferences
interests.startWithHint: Choose the type of stop you want to pick first.
interests.timeLabel: How much time do you have? (hours)
interests.dateLabel: What date do you want to plan?

activities.title: Activities
activities.noResults: No activities match your selected interests. Try broadening your search.

mealPrompt.title: Add a restaurant?
mealPrompt.subtitle: Would you like to add a meal or restaurant break to your day?

restaurants.title: Restaurants & Food
restaurants.noResults: No restaurants found. Try different cuisine or price filters.
restaurants.noKeyWarning: Demo mode: add a Google Places API key to see real restaurants.
restaurants.quotaWarning: Demo mode: Google Places quota reached — showing demo data.
restaurants.noLocationWarning: Demo mode: no location available — showing demo data.
restaurants.noResultsWarning: No restaurants found nearby — showing demo data.
restaurants.errorWarning: Demo mode: couldn't reach Google Places.
restaurants.noResultsFiltered: No restaurants match your cuisine or price filters in this area.
restaurants.noResultsArea: No restaurants found near your location.

timeline.title: Your Perfect Day
timeline.empty: No itinerary items. Try selecting more activities!
timeline.howToGetThere: ↓ How to get to next activity?
timeline.shareHint: Scan this QR code to share your itinerary

nearbyRestaurant.title: Restaurant Nearby!
nearbyRestaurant.message: There's a {{cuisine}} restaurant, {{name}}, just {{distance}}m away. Hungry?

activityBreak.title: Add an Activity?
activityBreak.message: Your plan has restaurants but no activities yet. Want to add something to do?

coffeeBreak.title: Time for a Break?
coffeeBreak.message: You've got 2+ hours of activities planned. Time for a coffee or meal?
